_comment: DEV/TEST ONLY. These values let anyone run the project without extra setup. Do NOT reuse this connection string or JWT SecretKey in production; override them with environment variables or user secrets there.

Firebase._comment: Left blank on purpose - do NOT commit a real service account JSON here. Override locally with the Firebase__ServiceAccountJson (inline JSON) or Firebase__ServiceAccountJsonPath (file path) and Firebase__ProjectId environment variables. Unlike ConnectionStrings/JwtToken above, a missing value here does not stop the API from starting - push notifications are a secondary feature and silently no-op instead.
